headline: HYT: Improved Valuation, But Bonds Likely To Remain Under Pressure
summary: The BlackRock Corporate High Yield Fund (HYT) offers an 11.02% yield, primarily through a diversified portfolio of junk bonds. Read the full CEF analysis here.
